title: Open source Observability platform | SigNoz
bodySample:
SigNoz
OpenTelemetry-Native Logs, Metrics and Traces in a single pane

console.text: Access to script at 'https://fast.appcues.com/generic/main/7.17.6/appcues.main.0aa93b691f53f8b2a7b7dce6ad16f640d96c3b21.js' from origin 'http://127.0.0.1:8080' has been blocked by CORS policy: Response to preflight request doesn't pass access control check: It does not have HTTP ok status.

Access to font at 'https://fonts.gstatic.com/s/inter/v20/UcCo3FwrK3iLTcviYwY.woff2' from origin 'http://127.0.0.1:8080' has been blocked by CORS policy: Request header field signoz-api-key is not allowed by Access-Control-Allow-Headers in preflight response.
